system.description: Thanks to this skill, a character is able to conceal objects of small or medium size so that it becomes difficult to find them, such as hiding a knife within clothing, a letter in a room, or a jewel in a trunk. A successful Conceal roll also allows him to help other characters to hide from the sight of others — but remember to use the Stealth skill to conceal oneself. It is common to make opposed rolls of Conceal and the Discovery skill of whoever tries to find a hidden person or object.
